data.name: Robella

weaponImprint.name: Wanderer's Magnum
weaponImprint.trait: Gains 1 random buff for 1 turn if the user has full HP at the start of the action.
weaponImprint.effect: Freeze Damage dealt is increased by 15%/18%/21%/24%/27%/30%. For every one instance of out-of-turn attack performed, damage dealt by out-of-turn attacks is increased by 7%/8%/9%/10%/11%/12%, to a maximum increase of 14%/16%/18%/20%/22%/24%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with Freeze debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to Girard Group units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects:
On the surface, Robella appears decisive and acts with swift efficiency. In reality, in places unseen, she has already been struggling alone for a long time. Her sensitivity, gentleness, and delicacy are things that only you can see.
"If you're too tired, leave the rest of the work to me... I wouldn't want the Commander to be absent from the upcoming strategy meeting."

skills.name: Ultra Shot
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Critical Insight
skills.description:
At the end of Robella's action, she gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

After using [effect:afaa648d-ffdb-4b3c-b07b-0c948ec32337], consumes all stacks of [effect:54660605-8e3f-4244-826c-0202d24b2df5] from the target, and Robella gains an equal number of stacks of [effect:4f47052f-2256-4f92-ac11-121ea39d024d].

When Robella has more than 2 stacks of [effect:4f47052f-2256-4f92-ac11-121ea39d024d], her basic attacks turn to deal Freeze damage, and her critical rate is increased by 20%.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the end of Robella's action, she gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

After using [effect:afaa648d-ffdb-4b3c-b07b-0c948ec32337], consumes all stacks of [effect:54660605-8e3f-4244-826c-0202d24b2df5] from the target, and Robella gains an equal number of stacks of [effect:4f47052f-2256-4f92-ac11-121ea39d024d].

When Robella has more than 2 stacks of [effect:4f47052f-2256-4f92-ac11-121ea39d024d], her basic attacks turn to deal Freeze damage, and her critical rate is increased by 20%.

When Robella has more than 5 stacks of [effect:4f47052f-2256-4f92-ac11-121ea39d024d], critical damage is increased by 30%, and the damage dealt by [effect:afaa648d-ffdb-4b3c-b07b-0c948ec32337] is increased by 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: When Robella has more than 5 stacks of [effect:4f47052f-2256-4f92-ac11-121ea39d024d], critical damage is increased by 30%, and the damage dealt by [effect:afaa648d-ffdb-4b3c-b07b-0c948ec32337] is increased by 30%.

skills.name: Light of Bond
skills.description: Selects one allied unit within 8 tiles (excluding Robella herself) and applies [effect:90dff636-dae1-450d-81ac-d376a9105155] to it. Only one of [effect:90dff636-dae1-450d-81ac-d376a9105155] can exist on the field at any given time. After using this skill, Robella gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. This skill can be used once per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one allied unit within 8 tiles (excluding Robella herself) and applies [effect:90dff636-dae1-450d-81ac-d376a9105155] to it. Only one [effect:90dff636-dae1-450d-81ac-d376a9105155] can exist on the field at any given time. Robella's attack is increased by an amount equal to 20% of the selected allied unit's initial attack. After using this skill, Robella gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. This skill can be used once per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Robella's attack is increased by an amount equal to 20% of the selected allied unit's initial attack.

skills.name: Radiant Memory
skills.description: Gains [effect:ee3d831c-aafc-41e8-9534-81499f02153f] for 2 rounds. After using this skill, Robella gains [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] for 2 turns. [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] absorbs damage equal to 65% of Robella's initial attack and cannot exceed 60% of her max HP.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Gains [effect:ee3d831c-aafc-41e8-9534-81499f02153f] for 4 rounds. After using this skill, Robella gains [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] for 2 turns. [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] absorbs damage equal to 65% of Robella's initial attack and cannot exceed 60% of her max HP.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage boost from [effect:ee3d831c-aafc-41e8-9534-81499f02153f] is increased to 50% instead. [effect:ee3d831c-aafc-41e8-9534-81499f02153f]'s gains additional effects: When launching [effect:afaa648d-ffdb-4b3c-b07b-0c948ec32337], applies 1 stack of [effect:c9675d00-1e4e-47a8-81a0-d23d9b4db729] to the target for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: [effect:ee3d831c-aafc-41e8-9534-81499f02153f]'s duration is increased by 2 rounds.

skills.name: Howling Cyclone
skills.description: Selects a direction, dealing AoE Freeze damage equal to 120% of attack to all targets in a cone of 4 tiles in the target direction.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects a direction, dealing AoE Freeze damage equal to 120% of attack to all targets in a cone of 4 tiles in the target direction. For each stack of [effect:4f47052f-2256-4f92-ac11-121ea39d024d], damage multiplier is increased by 9%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier is increased to 150%. For each stack of [effect:4f47052f-2256-4f92-ac11-121ea39d024d], damage multiplier is increased by 9%.

keys.effect: While this unit has [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600] effects, phase damage dealt is increased by 10%.
keys.displayTitle: Common Key - Justice Is My Strength

keys.effect: Before allies with [effect:90dff636-dae1-450d-81ac-d376a9105155] launches active attacks or [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800]s, Robella applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to the targeted enemy for 2 turns.
At the end of action, if Robella has [effect:ee3d831c-aafc-41e8-9534-81499f02153f], she gains [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] for 1 turn.
After using the basic attack Ultra Shot, Robella gains 2 stacks of [effect:4f47052f-2256-4f92-ac11-121ea39d024d].

When Robella or an allied unit [effect:90dff636-dae1-450d-81ac-d376a9105155] deals Freeze damage to an enemy unit with [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600], [effect:82ff98b1-d7cc-426b-9cdd-9285847ee86b] is increased by 30% and damage dealt is increased by 20%.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 4 - Less Than A Dinergate

keys.effect: When standing on allied [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles, Robella gains 5 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] after using her basic attack Ultra Shot or her Ultimate skill Howling Cyclone.
Before performing [effect:afaa648d-ffdb-4b3c-b07b-0c948ec32337], cleanses 2 buffs from the target.

vertebrae.effect: Robella's attack is increased by an amount equal to 20% of the selected allied unit's initial attack.

doll.name: Robella
doll.effects:
On the surface, Robella appears decisive and acts with swift efficiency. In reality, in places unseen, she has already been struggling alone for a long time. Her sensitivity, gentleness, and delicacy are things that only you can see.
"If you're too tired, leave the rest of the work to me... I wouldn't want the Commander to be absent from the upcoming strategy meeting."

imagoforms.effect: When the unit has a shield, damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Freeze damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt by attacks that only hit 1 enemy unit is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Deals Freeze damage equal to 150% of attack and 2 points of stability damage to the enemy target.

At the end of action, if the status holder is within 8 tiles of Robella, Robella will launch [effect:afaa648d-ffdb-4b3c-b07b-0c948ec32337] against it, and the damage multiplier of [effect:afaa648d-ffdb-4b3c-b07b-0c948ec32337] is increased by 3%, maximum of 6 stacks. Cannot be cleansed.

At the end of action, if the status holder is within 8 tiles of Robella, Robella will launch [effect:afaa648d-ffdb-4b3c-b07b-0c948ec32337] against it, and the damage multiplier of [effect:afaa648d-ffdb-4b3c-b07b-0c948ec32337] is increased by 9%, maximum of 6 stacks. Cannot be cleansed.
Mobility is reduced by 1 tile. This effect has a maximum of 5 stacks. Can be considered a [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc] effect. Considered a Freeze debuff.

When dealing damage against a target with [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600], the attack ignores the stated percentage of shield strength and directly damages the target's HP.

When dealing Freeze damage, attack is increased by an amount equal to 10% of Robella's initial attack. When the buff holder deals damage to an enemy target with an active attack or an [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], Robella applies 1 stack of [effect:54660605-8e3f-4244-826c-0202d24b2df5] to the target. If the buff holder deals Freeze damage, Robella applies an additional 1 stack. After skill usage, the target takes Freeze damage equal to 20% of Robella's attack. Cannot be cleansed.

When dealing Freeze damage, attack is increased by an amount equal to 15% of Robella's initial attack. When the buff holder deals damage to an enemy target with an active attack or an [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], Robella applies 2 stacks of [effect:99e43a86-0dfa-491b-a50b-fe7c7354f441] to the target. If the buff holder deals Freeze damage, Robella applies an additional 1 stack. After skill usage, the target takes Freeze damage equal to 30% of Robella's attack. Cannot be cleansed.
